mapper.insert:
SELECT review_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
insert into review values (#{reviewNo}, #{reviewTitle}, #{reviewContent}, #{memberNo}, #{restNo}, #{createDate})
mapper.select: SELECT rv.reviewNo, rv.reviewTitle, rv.reviewContent, rv.createDate, rv.memberNo, m.memberName, m.memberId, m.country, rv.restNo, ri.reviewImgUrl FROM review rv JOIN member m ON rv.memberNo = m.memberNo LEFT JOIN reviewImage ri ON rv.reviewNo = ri.reviewNo WHERE rv.restNo = #{restNo}
